title: Fortis Healthcare signs O&M agreement with Dion Group for 300-bed hospital in Odisha
summary: Multi-specialty hospital at Dion Riverside Township in Cuttack to expand Fortis Healthcare’s presence in Eastern India
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
Multi-specialty hospital at Dion Riverside Township in Cuttack to expand Fortis Healthcare’s presence in Eastern India

Fortis Healthcare has signed an Operations and Management (O&M) agreement with Dion Group for a 300-bed greenfield multi-specialty hospital to be developed at Dion Riverside Township, Trishulia, in Cuttack, Odisha.

According to the company, Dion Group, headquartered in Bhubaneswar, has a presence in Odisha through residential, commercial and integrated township developments and is expanding its footprint across hospitality and healthcare infrastructure.

Once operational, the hospital will serve patients across Odisha and neighbouring regions by providing tertiary care services, clinical expertise, medical technology and healthcare services.

The hospital will be located in the Cuttack-Bhubaneswar corridor and is planned as a Centre of Excellence for multiple specialties. According to the company, the facility will provide tertiary and quaternary care services supported by diagnostics, critical care infrastructure and specialised clinical programmes.

The collaboration marks Fortis Healthcare’s first major presence in Odisha and forms part of the company’s strategy to expand healthcare access through brownfield expansion and inorganic growth initiatives, including operations and management agreements and asset-light growth models.

Commenting on the collaboration, Dr Ashutosh Raghuvanshi, Managing Director and CEO, Fortis Healthcare, said, “We are delighted to partner with Dion Group for this important healthcare project in Odisha. The upcoming 300-bed multi-specialty hospital will play a significant role in improving access to advanced tertiary care services for patients across Cuttack, Bhubaneswar, and neighbouring regions. This collaboration represents an important milestone in Fortis Healthcare’s growth journey and reflects our continued commitment to expanding high-quality healthcare infrastructure across India. We look forward to bringing Fortis’ clinical excellence, patient-centric care, and operational expertise to Odisha.”

Manoj Sahoo, Promoter, Dion Group, said, “At Dion Group, our vision has always been to create integrated communities supported by world-class infrastructure and services. As one of Odisha’s leading development groups, we are committed to contributing meaningfully to the state’s growth and quality of life. We are pleased to partner with Fortis Healthcare, one of India’s leading healthcare providers, to bring a world-class multi-specialty hospital to Odisha. This collaboration brings together Fortis’ proven clinical and operational expertise with our vision of creating modern healthcare infrastructure for the state. The project will help address the growing demand for advanced healthcare services and provide patients access to quality medical care closer to home.”

According to the company, the proposed hospital is expected to strengthen the region’s healthcare ecosystem by increasing access to specialised treatment, reducing the need for patients to travel outside Odisha for complex medical care, and supporting clinical services, medical talent and healthcare innovation.
